9/1/22Regular Price:$29.99Games"},{"url":"https://games.gg/news/nintendo-switch-2-pokopia-bundle-september/","title":"Nintendo Switch 2 Pokopia Bundle: Buy Before September Price Hike | GAMES.GG","content":"Buying the console and game separately right now costs more than this bundle, even when the standalone Switch 2 dips slightly below its standard retail price.
That social hook is a big part of why this bundle makes more sense than the Mario Kart World version for anyone buying specifically to play with friends who already own a Switch 2.
What you do get is a clean package at a price that undercuts buying both items separately, with the saving sitting at roughly $30 equivalent when you do the math across current retail prices.
For context, the Mario Kart World bundle launched at the same price point when the console debuted in June 2025."},{"url":"https://www.videogameschronicle.com/news/nintendo-announces-pokemon-pokopia-switch-2-pack-coming-next-month/","title":"Nintendo announces Pokémon Pokopia Switch 2 pack, coming next month | VGC","content":"Nintendo and The Pokémon Company have announced a new Nintendo Switch 2 bundle for Europe, which will include Pokémon Pokopia.
It will be available via the Nintendo Store and select retail partners, and launch on July 2 for £429.99/ €499.99.
The console included in this bundle appears to be unchanged from the launch model.
In addition, a paid expansion will allow players to access a new underwater town, Bubbly Basin, along with new outfits, furniture, and Pokémon.
A second paid expansion is due in late 2026, and the third and final expansion will arrive in 2027.
Remasters of Fallout 3 and Fallout New Vegas are also on the way"},{"url":"https://www.nintendo.com/au/news-and-articles/craft-cosy-towns-with-the-nintendo-switch-2-pokemon-pokopia-bundle/","title":"Craft cosy towns with the Nintendo Switch 2 + Pokémon Pokopia bundle - Nintendo","content":"Players can purchase the Nintendo Switch 2 + Pokémon Pokopia bundle when it releases in Australia and New Zealand from 5th June, 2026 for a suggested retail price of AU$769.95 / NZ$869.95.
The bundle includes a full game download of Pokémon Pokopia for the included Nintendo Switch 2 console, offering a saving of up to AU$39.95 / NZ$49.95 compared to buying separately.
In Pokémon Pokopia, you play as a Ditto and savour the slow life in a relaxing life simulation game devoted to crafting, creating, and building.
Pre-purchase for the bundle is now available on Nintendo Store, with pre-orders at select retailers to follow in the near future.
For more information about Pokémon Pokopia, visit the game page or the official website."},{"url":"https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/pokemon-pokopia-expansion-pass-70070000037146-switch-2/","title":"Pokémon Pokopia Expansion Pass DLC for ...","content":"Jun 9, 2026 — The following DLC is included: - Part 1: Bubbly Basin, scheduled for release in August 2026. - Part 2, scheduled for release in late 2026.Read more"}]}
